hero.headline: Your ops outgrew your tools. We fix that.
hero.subtext: We help mid-market manufacturing, distribution, and industrial companies build connected systems, scalable infrastructure, and operational clarity,  so you can grow without the chaos.
hero.trustBadge: Trusted by operations leaders across North America

whoWeHelp.title: Who We Help
whoWeHelp.subtitle: We specialize in B2B operations for companies with 10–500 employees in complex, process-driven industries.

manufacturing.title: Manufacturing
manufacturing.description: Job shops, contract manufacturers, and OEMs who need their production, inventory, and finance systems to work as one.

distribution.title: Distribution & Logistics
distribution.description: Distributors and 3PLs struggling with disconnected order management, warehouse ops, and carrier integrations.

industrial.title: Industrial Services
industrial.description: Field service, maintenance, and specialty contractors who've outgrown spreadsheets and need real operational infrastructure.

other.title: Other B2B Operations
other.description: Any B2B business with operational complexity that has outpaced its current toolset.

differentiators.title: Why Operations Leaders Choose Awesoon
differentiators.subtitle: We're not a big-four consulting firm. We're operators who've been in the weeds and built the systems to get out.

items.title: Independent by design
items.description: We don't sell software — we design solutions. Our recommendations are driven by operational fit, not vendor partnerships or commissions.

items.title: Built from real operational experience
items.description: We've worked inside growing businesses, not just around them — designing systems for real users, real constraints, and real scale.

items.title: Practical scaling, not corporate bureaucracy
items.description: We help businesses grow structure and capability without losing agility, culture, or speed.

items.title: End-user-first design
items.description: Systems are only successful if people actually use them. We design for adoption, usability, and operational reality — not theoretical perfection.

items.title: High-touch, senior-led delivery
items.description: You work with experienced operators, not layered teams or junior consultants. That means faster decisions, clearer communication, and real accountability.

items.title: Focus your team on what matters
items.description: We remove the need to build internal delivery teams or hire FTE specialists — so you can stay focused on running and growing your business.

process.title: How We Work
process.ctaButton: Start with a Free Systems Audit
process.subtitle: A proven four-step engagement model that gets you from chaos to clarity.

steps.title: Systems Audit
steps.description: We map your current tools, integrations, data flows, and workflows. You'll get a complete picture of where your operational complexity lives,  and what it's costing you.

steps.title: Solution Design
steps.description: We design a connected system architecture tailored to your operations. No generic playbooks,  every recommendation is specific to your team, your processes, and your budget.

steps.title: Implementation
steps.description: We manage the full implementation: vendor selection, configuration, data migration, integrations, and change management. We do the heavy lifting.

steps.title: Stabilization & Handoff
steps.description: We don't disappear at go-live. We stay through stabilization, train your team, document everything, and make sure your ops team is confident and capable.

solutions.title: Solutions
solutions.subtitle: Every engagement starts with a deep understanding of your operations. Here are the most common problems we solve.

aiOperations.title: AI Operations & RAG Enablement
aiOperations.description: We help mid-market teams deploy RAG assistants, workflow agents, and AI copilots on top of stable systems, governed data, and real operational use cases.

opsOutgrown.title: Ops Outgrown Your Tools
opsOutgrown.description: Your business has scaled but your systems haven't kept up. We design and implement the infrastructure your next stage of growth demands.

spreadsheetOps.title: Spreadsheet Operations
spreadsheetOps.description: Running a mid-market company on Excel is a liability. We replace spreadsheet-dependent processes with reliable, scalable systems.

systemIntegration.title: System Integration
systemIntegration.description: Disconnected systems create manual work, errors, and blind spots. We connect your tools so data flows automatically where it needs to go.

erpImplementation.title: ERP Implementation
erpImplementation.description: ERP projects fail when led by vendors. We're on your side,  selecting, configuring, and implementing an ERP that actually fits your operations.

crmImplementation.title: CRM Implementation
crmImplementation.description: Your sales team needs more than a contact database. We implement CRMs that give your team pipeline visibility, forecasting, and actionable data.

apiIntegrations.title: API Integrations
apiIntegrations.description: Manual data transfer between systems is a productivity tax. We build the integrations that eliminate re-keying, reduce errors, and save hours every week.

customApiDevelopment.title: Custom API Development
customApiDevelopment.description: When native connectors are not enough, we build the middleware, endpoints, and integration logic your operation actually needs.

ecommerceDevelopment.title: Ecommerce Development
ecommerceDevelopment.description: We build ecommerce systems that work across storefront, fulfillment, inventory, ERP, CRM, and the operational realities behind them.

vendorManagement.title: Vendor Management & Selection
vendorManagement.description: Choosing the wrong software is expensive. We run a structured vendor selection process so you choose the right tool for your specific operations.

systemsAudit.title: Systems Audit
systemsAudit.description: Don't know where to start? Our systems audit gives you a complete map of your operational tech stack, gaps, and a prioritized roadmap for improvement.

supportHome.title: Support After Go-Live
supportHome.subtitle: We do not only deliver projects. We also support live systems, take over from weak providers, and help teams keep improving after launch.

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: Operator-led post-launch support for the systems already running your business. Stabilization, maintenance, change requests, provider replacement, and ongoing improvement.

insights.title: Operational Insights
insights.subtitle: Practical guidance from operators who've been in the weeds.
insights.noPosts: No posts yet. Check back soon.

hero.headline: Built by operators, for operators.
hero.subtext: Awesoon means "easy" in Persian. We chose that name deliberately — because running operations should feel that way. We started Awesoon after living the opposite: managing growth at real companies where the systems fought you at every turn. We built this practice to change that.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: To make operations easy — not in a naive way, but in the way that comes from having the right systems, the right data, and the right processes working together. We give mid-market teams the connected infrastructure they need to grow without the chaos, without bloated consulting fees, and without cookie-cutter solutions that don't fit.

items.title: Honesty over polish
items.description: We'll tell you what we actually think, not what sounds good in a slide deck.

items.title: Implementation over advice
items.description: Recommendations are worth nothing if they're never executed. We build it with you.

items.title: Right-fit over best-in-class
items.description: The best system for you is the one your team will actually use. We optimize for adoption.

items.title: Long-term over quick wins
items.description: We design for where your business is going, not just where it is today.

team.title: The Team
team.subtitle: Two operators who've been in the weeds — and built systems to get out.

cta.headline: Operations should feel easy. Let's get you there.
cta.subtext: Start with a free systems audit. No pitch deck, no sales pressure — just a clear-eyed look at where your operations stand and what it would take to make them work the way they should.

contact.title: Let's Talk
contact.subtitle: Tell us what’s breaking, growing, or getting stuck. We’ll help you find the right next move.

footer.tagline: Awesoon means easy. That's what operations should feel like.
footer.readyHeadline: Ready for operations that actually feel easy?
footer.readySubtext: A 30-minute call. No pitch deck. Just an honest look at your systems and a clear path forward.
footer.humanReplies: A real person replies within 24 hours.
footer.noTracking: No cookies set without your consent.

banner.title: We use cookies
banner.description: We use essential cookies to make our site work. With your permission, we'd also like to use analytics cookies to understand how you use our site and improve your experience.
banner.learnMore: Learn more about our cookie policy

necessary.title: Necessary Cookies
necessary.description: These cookies are required for the site to function. They cannot be disabled.

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
analytics.description: These cookies help us understand how visitors use our site. We use Google Analytics 4. No personal data is sent without your consent.

marketing.title: Marketing Cookies
marketing.description: These cookies are used to deliver relevant ads and track campaign effectiveness. Currently, we do not use any marketing cookies.

problemSolutions.title: Recognize Any of These?
problemSolutions.subtitle: If your operations look like this, we've built the playbook to fix it.

items.problem: "We have 4 systems and none of them talk to each other."
"Our entire order process lives in a spreadsheet."
"We bought an ERP 2 years ago and we're still not live."
"We don't know what's in our warehouse until we physically count it."
